ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.TEXT: I'm a Costa Rican software engineer passionate about web development, cybersecurity, and data. Driven by curiosity and a constant desire to learn, whether it's improving my coding skills or building more secure and resilient systems.

EDUCATION.SUBTITLE: Academic background that has shaped my technical foundation.

PROJECTS.TITLE: My Projects
PROJECTS.SUBTITLE: Here are some of the projects that I've worked on.

GAME_HUB.DESCRIPTION: React application built with TypeScript, Vite, Firebase, and the RAWG API to explore video game data and practice core React concepts.

TECNO_TANKS.DESCRIPTION: Modern Python/Pygame game inspired by Battle City (1990). Implements process management, thread synchronization, inter-thread communication, and real-time resource control in a client-server architecture.

DB_VISUALIZER.DESCRIPTION: Web-based application to dynamically connect to different relational database engines and visualize their database schema.

CHRISTMAS_COMPILER.DESCRIPTION: Java-based academic compiler implementing lexical, syntactic, and semantic analysis using JFLEX and Java CUP, including symbol table management and semantic validation.

MINI_SNS.DESCRIPTION: Simple social networking service to practice full-stack development. Implements user authentication, post creation, friend management, comments, and likes.

SKILLS.TITLE: Skills
SKILLS.SUBTITLE: I integrate technical proficiency and interpersonal strengths to build high-impact software.

COLLABORATION.TITLE: Effective Collaboration
COLLABORATION.DESC: I have worked seamlessly within multidisciplinary teams, fostering a positive environment and ensuring project goals were met through clear, constant communication.

PROBLEM_SOLVING.TITLE: Adaptive Problem Solving
PROBLEM_SOLVING.DESC: I successfully tackled complex technical challenges by breaking them down into manageable tasks and finding creative, efficient solutions under pressure.

LEARNING.TITLE: Continuous Learning
LEARNING.DESC: I have demonstrated a strong commitment to professional growth by quickly mastering new technologies and staying updated with the latest industry trends.

TIME_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: Time Management
TIME_MANAGEMENT.DESC: I consistently delivered high-quality results within tight deadlines by effectively prioritizing tasks and managing my workflow with precision.

COMMUNICATION.TITLE: Empathetic Communication
COMMUNICATION.DESC: I have translated technical jargon into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders, ensuring everyone stayed aligned on the project vision.

CRITICAL_THINKING.TITLE: Critical Thinking
CRITICAL_THINKING.DESC: I analyzed project requirements from multiple perspectives to identify potential risks early and implement proactive improvements to the development process.
